inputs.name: autoDismiss
inputs.description: Whether the alert should be automatically dismissed.

inputs.name: dismissible
inputs.description: Whether the message strip is dismissible

inputs.name: duration
inputs.description: Duration of time *in milliseconds* that the alert will be visible. Set to -1 for indefinite.

inputs.name: mousePersist
inputs.description: Whether the alert should stay open if the mouse is hovering over it.

methods.name: open
methods.description:
Opens the message strip and starts auto-dismiss timer if configured.
This method is part of the public API via exportAs.
